name: WP-L12-modal-focus-roles: modal focus trap, roles, input labels, badge semantics
description: Modal focus management + role/label annotation sweep. Findings: F-052 + F-070 (0 of 13 modals use accessibilityViewIsModal — coordinator-verified) · F-055 (form inputs lack accessibilityLabel; visible labels are detached siblings) · F-057 (tappables with text children but no accessibilityRole=button) · F-058 (escalation/verification badges convey state via color + tiny text, no role). Full finding text: docs/audit/2026-05-29-full-audit/L-gap-delta.md (label l10n-a11y-mobile).
acceptanceCriteria: All 13 modals trap VoiceOver focus; form inputs programmatically labeled; tappables carry roles; badges expose state non-visually.
riskImpact: S-M / attribute-level changes, low regression risk.
bodyText:
Bundle brief (WP-L12-modal-focus-roles)
Transcribed from the PRG-12 execution tracker §1 (_wip/l10n-a11y/execution-tracker.md @ 9570f5b63) — bundle #3 of 8. Children are absorbed provenance (lifecycle rides this parent): WI-653 / WI-654.
Bundle rationale
Modal and role semantics travel together: the same 13 modal components need accessibilityViewIsModal AND correct roles/labels; one pass over that component surface fixes both classes.
Strategy
Sweep the 13 modals: add accessibilityViewIsModal (iOS focus trap) and verify the Android back/dismiss path announces correctly. Then the semantics pass: attach labels to their inputs (accessibilityLabel/labelledBy patterns), add accessibilityRole to tappables, and give state badges a role + label so color+text is not the only channel. Any NEW user-visible strings route through t() (same-PR keys). Document the modal pattern in code for reuse.
Scope
In: F-052, F-070, F-055, F-057, F-058. Out: hardcoded label STRING extraction (WI-624 — if a label is missing entirely, add it via t(); if it exists but is hardcoded English, leave for WI-624); announcements (WI-622, landed); decorative hiding (WI-628).
Findings
F-052 — 0 of 13 modals use accessibilityViewIsModal; SR focus escapes behind the modal.
F-070 — Coordinator synthesis: all 13 modals need focus management.
F-055 — Form labels detached from their inputs.
F-057 — Tappables missing accessibilityRole.
F-058 — Badge conveys state by color+text with no role/label semantics.
Full finding text: docs/audit/2026-05-29-full-audit/L-gap-delta.md (label l10n-a11y-mobile).
Acceptance Criteria (bundle)
All 13 modals trap SR focus (accessibilityViewIsModal or equivalent) — verified per modal.
Inputs have attached labels; tappables have roles; state badges expose role+label semantics.
New strings through t() with same-PR en.json keys; i18n checkers + typecheck + related tests green.
Risk & blast radius
Low-medium — a11y props on existing components; overlaps WI-624's file surface (run adjacent/serial with it, never parallel).
